_meta.description: Schema for a duplicate cluster record in the Oil Painting Research Assistant. A cluster groups two or more sources or chunks that have been identified as duplicates or near-duplicates. One cluster per duplicate group. The canonical_id identifies the preferred record.

cluster_id.description: Unique duplicate cluster ID. Assigned when the cluster is created.

entity_type.description: Whether this cluster contains source records or chunk records.

member_ids.description: List of source_id or chunk_id values that are members of this cluster. Must include the canonical_id.

canonical_id.description: The source_id or chunk_id of the preferred record in the cluster. Other members are subordinate to this record.

reason.description: Explanation of why these records were grouped: what they share, how they differ, and why the canonical was chosen.

reviewer.description: Username or identifier of the reviewer who made the deduplication decision.

decision_date.description: Date the cluster decision was made.

status.description: Current state of the cluster decision. 'open' means pending final action. 'resolved' means the canonical has been confirmed and non-canonical members have been handled.

notes.description: Optional additional context about the duplication or the decision.
